end,{},function(c,k)local y=h(k)local m=function(m,a,n,g,G)return p(c,{m,a,n;g,G},k,y)end return m end,function(c,k)local y=h(k)local m=function(m,a,n,g,G,C)return p(c,{m;a;n,g,G,C},k,y)end return m end return(w(111193+13378089,{}))(y(G))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[k(-690816+674539)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
